OUR MISSION TEXT: Lead in delivering innovative architectural and sustainable solutions that shape Saudi Arabia's built environment.
OUR VISION TEXT: To be the engineering firm of choice — a trusted, invaluable partner to every client we serve.
aboutHeroBody: Noon Consultants is a specialized firm in urban planning, architecture, and interior design — built on a methodology that balances beauty, function, and sustainability.
aboutHeroBullet1: Understanding the context of each project
aboutText1: Noon Consultants is one of the specialized firms in urban planning, architecture, and interior design in the Kingdom of Saudi Arabia.
aboutText2:
Since our establishment in 2011, we have developed a design methodology based on:
• Understanding the context of each project
• Studying client needs
• Achieving balance between beauty and function
• Delivering sustainable and executable solutions
aboutText3: Our success is built on the quality of our team and their diverse expertise, and their ability to produce high-level designs that contribute to the success of projects socially, environmentally, and economically.
aboutCeoQuote: We do not view projects as drawings alone — we see them as a responsibility and a trust placed in our hands.
aboutText4: Successful projects begin with a deep understanding of client needs, realized through creative solutions that balance quality, efficiency, and design excellence.
aboutText5: At every stage, we strive to deliver real value — with full commitment to professional standards and execution precision.
aboutCeoStandout: At Noon, quality is not an option — it is our standard.
address1: Riyadh, Saudi Arabia – Northern Ring Road, Exit 2, 12385, Al-Nakheel District – Reef Village, 1st Floor, Office No. 6
address2: Al-Madinah, Saudi Arabia Abdusalam Ibn Hafes St, Al Iskan District

careers.heroSubtitle: Great design comes from great people. We're always looking for architects, engineers, and designers who are passionate about shaping Saudi Arabia's built environment.
careers.description: At Noon Consultants, we believe that great design comes from great people. We're always looking for talented individuals who are passionate about architecture, urban planning, and design to join our dynamic team.

architect.description: We are seeking a talented Senior Architect to lead design projects and mentor junior team members.
requirements: Bachelor's or Master's degree in Architecture
5+ years of experience in architectural design
Proficiency in AutoCAD, Revit, and SketchUp
Strong design and visualization skills
Experience with Saudi building codes and regulations
architect.title: Senior Architect

interiorDesigner.description: Create inspiring interior spaces that blend functionality with aesthetic excellence.
requirements: Bachelor's degree in Interior Design
2+ years of experience in interior design
Proficiency in design software (3D Max, Photoshop, etc.)
Strong sense of color, texture, and space
Portfolio showcasing completed projects
interiorDesigner.title: Interior Designer

projectManager.description: Lead and coordinate architectural and engineering projects from conception to completion.
requirements: Bachelor's degree in Engineering or Architecture
PMP certification preferred
5+ years of project management experience
Strong leadership and communication skills
Experience with construction and design projects
projectManager.title: Project Manager

urbanPlanner.description: Join our urban planning team to create sustainable and innovative urban development solutions.
requirements: Bachelor's degree in Urban Planning or related field
3+ years of experience in urban planning
Knowledge of GIS software and planning tools
Understanding of sustainable development principles
Excellent analytical and communication skills
urbanPlanner.title: Urban Planner

jobResponsibilities.responsibility1: Develop And Lead Brand Identity Systems, Including Logos, Typography, Color Palettes, And Visual Languages.
jobResponsibilities.responsibility2: Translate Brand Strategy Into Compelling Visual Narratives Across Digital And Print.
jobResponsibilities.responsibility3: Create Mood Boards, Concept Presentations, And Brand Guidelines Tailored To Client Needs.
jobResponsibilities.responsibility4: Collaborate With Cross-Functional Teams (Marketing, Development, Production) To Ensure Brand Consistency.
jobResponsibilities.responsibility5: Supervise Junior Designers And Provide Mentorship, Feedback, And Creative Direction.

projects.breif: Over the years, we have partnered with a wide range of organizations across Saudi Arabia, earning a reputation for excellence and reliability. Each project has contributed to the deep, specialized knowledge we bring to every new challenge. Our portfolio is delivered by seasoned professionals with extensive industry experience, each bringing focused expertise across key functional areas. We are committed to providing high-quality, client-focused solutions that support the sustainable, innovative, and long-term success of every project we undertake.

members.name: DR. NIZAR ALSAYED
members.description: is the Founder of Noon Engineering Consultants, bringing over 30 years of experience in architecture and urban planning. He holds a Bachelor's degree in Architecture and a Master's degree in Urban Planning from King Saud University, in addition to a PhD obtained internationally. Throughout his career, Dr. Nizar has led and contributed to a wide range of major projects, shaping urban environments and delivering high-impact developments. His expertise spans architectural design, urban planning, and strategic development, with a strong focus on quality, sustainability, and long-term value. Under his leadership, the firm continues to grow with a clear vision rooted in excellence, innovation, and professional integrity.

members.name: FARES ALSAYED
members.description: Fares Al Sayed is the General Manager of Administration & Development, leading organizational strategy and business operations. He brings extensive experience in administrative leadership and business development, driving performance and supporting the firm's growth objectives. He holds a Bachelor's degree in Business Administration from Al Yamamah University.

members.name: RAKAN ABUDAQQA
members.description: Rakan Abudaqqa is the Design & Development Director at Noon Consultants, bringing over 10 years of experience in architectural design and project development. He holds a Bachelor's degree in Architecture from Al Yamamah University and has an academic background in Mechanical Engineering, with over two and a half years of study in the field. Throughout his career, Rakan has contributed to a wide range of projects, leading design development and coordination across multidisciplinary teams. He plays a key role in aligning design vision with technical and regulatory requirements while ensuring high standards of quality and efficiency. Under his leadership, projects are driven by a clear focus on design excellence, functionality, and long-term value.

members.name: SHAHAD ALDOWAH
members.description: Project Management Officer (PMO) at Noon Consultants. Shahad has been with the firm for one year, contributing to project planning, coordination, and progress tracking. Known for her strong organizational skills and team collaboration, she holds a B.S degree in Project Management from Princess Noura University.

members.name: RANIA MAHI
members.description: Executive Assistant at Noon Consultants. Rania has been with the firm for one year, supporting administrative coordination and executive operations. Known for her strong organizational and communication skills, she holds a degree in Public Administration from King Faisal University.

members.name: MUDATHER ABUDRESS
members.description: is a Database Controller at Noon Consultants, bringing over 13 years of experience in data and document management. He holds a Bachelor's degree in Computer Science and joined the firm in 2015. Throughout his career, he has been responsible for managing and maintaining project data, ensuring accuracy, organization, and efficient information flow across teams. He plays a key role in supporting project operations through structured data control and coordination, contributing to the overall efficiency and reliability of project delivery.

members.name: AL WALID ALBAIK
members.description: is an Architect and AI Specialist at Noon Consultants, experience in architectural design and digital innovation. He holds a Bachelor's degree in Architecture from Al Yamamah University and has been with the firm for two years, contributing to a range of residential and commercial projects. Throughout his career, he has combined architectural expertise with advanced digital tools, focusing on design development, visualization, and integrating AI-driven solutions into the design process. He plays a key role in enhancing design efficiency and delivering innovative, high-quality outcomes aligned with project requirements.

members.name: FARIS ALAZIM
members.description: A Design Manager and Interior Architect with solid experience leading design workflows across residential, commercial, and exhibition projects. Skilled in guiding teams, driving concept development, producing high-fidelity visualizations, and delivering precise technical documentation. Adept at coordinating with stakeholders, contractors, and suppliers to ensure seamless execution from concept to final delivery.

members.name: SALMAN ALSAIDI
members.description: Salman Sultan Alsaeedi is an Architect Engineer at Noon Consultants, with experience in architectural design and project coordination. He holds a Bachelor's degree in Architecture from the University of Hail and has contributed to a range of residential and development projects. Throughout his work, Salman has been involved in design development, BIM modeling, and preparation of working drawings, ensuring alignment with project requirements and regulatory standards. He plays an active role in supporting project delivery through coordination and technical development, contributing to efficient and high-quality design outcomes.

members.name: HOSSAM ALRASHID
members.description: is a junior Architect and Interior Designer at Noon Consultants, holding a Bachelor's degree in Architecture from King Saud University. As a junior professional, he brings a fresh and creative approach to design, with a strong passion for innovation and detail. Throughout his work, Hussam contributes to concept development, architectural and interior design, and visual presentations. He is known for his creative thinking and ability to generate unique design ideas, supporting the team in delivering visually engaging and functional design solutions aligned with project requirements.

members.name: AHMED RASHWANI
members.description: Ahmed Rashwani is an Architect and BIM Specialist at Noon Consultants, holding a Bachelor's degree in Architecture from Al Yamamah University. As a junior professional, he brings strong technical capabilities in architectural design and Building Information Modeling (BIM). Throughout his work, Ahmed contributes to design development, BIM modeling, and coordination across multidisciplinary teams. He is known for his attention to detail and ability to support accurate, well-coordinated design outputs, enhancing project efficiency and ensuring alignment with technical and project requirements.

members.name: ABDULBAQI TAHER
members.description: is a Mechanical Engineer at Noon Consultants, with experience in MEP systems design and coordination across various building projects. He holds a Bachelor's degree in Mechanical Engineering from Prince Sattam Bin Abdulaziz University. Throughout his work, Abdulbaqi has been involved in HVAC, plumbing, and firefighting systems, contributing to design development, technical coordination, and site implementation. He plays an active role in supporting project delivery by ensuring compliance with codes and standards while maintaining efficiency and quality across all stages of execution.

members.name: ATTA ALATRASH
members.description: Ata Al Atrash is a Senior Planning Engineer at Noon Consultants, bringing over 10 years of experience in project planning, scheduling, and performance management across engineering projects. He holds a Bachelor's degree in Engineering from Al Hussein Bin Talal University, Jordan. Throughout his career, Ata has specialized in developing and managing project schedules using Primavera P6 and Microsoft Project, along with preparing advanced reports and dashboards to support data-driven decision-making. He plays a key role in monitoring project progress, optimizing performance, and ensuring alignment with project objectives and industry best practices.

members.name: MAHMOUD ELASSAS
members.description: is a Senior Structural Engineer at Noon Consultants, experience in structural engineering and construction supervision. He holds a Bachelor's degree in Civil/Structural Engineering from Delta University, Egypt. Throughout his career, Mahmoud has been involved in supervising reinforced concrete works, site execution, and coordination across multidisciplinary teams. He plays a key role in ensuring that structural works are delivered in compliance with approved drawings, specifications, and safety standards, contributing to efficient and high-quality project delivery.

members.name: MOHAMED JAMAL
members.description: is an Electrical Engineer at Noon Consultants, with experience in electrical design and coordination for residential and commercial projects. He holds a Bachelor's degree in Electrical Engineering from the American University of Sharjah and is currently pursuing a Master's degree in Engineering and Systems Management at Alfaisal University. Throughout his work, Mohamed has been involved in electrical layouts, load calculations, and single line diagrams, as well as reviewing technical submittals and coordinating with multidisciplinary teams. He plays an active role in ensuring integrated MEP design and compliance with project requirements, contributing to efficient and high-quality project delivery.

members.name: MOHAMED DARWISH
members.description: is an Electrical Engineer at Noon Consultants, with strong experience in electrical systems design, installation, and supervision across residential, commercial, and industrial projects. He holds a Bachelor's degree in Electrical Power Engineering from the University of Damascus. Throughout his career, Mohammed has specialized in power distribution, low-voltage systems, and panel engineering, contributing to design development, site execution, and technical coordination. He plays a key role in ensuring compliance with international and local standards, including IEC and NFPA, while delivering safe, efficient, and high-quality electrical solutions.

members.name: MOHAMED SHAABAN
members.description: is a Technical Officer at Noon Consultants, bringing over 17 years of experience in architectural and civil drafting, as well as quantity surveying. He holds a diploma in Civil Engineering and a diploma in CAD, and completed his studies in India. Throughout his career, he has developed strong expertise in preparing detailed drawings, quantity take-offs, and supporting project teams across various stages of design and execution. He plays a key role in ensuring accuracy, coordination, and efficiency in technical documentation, contributing to the successful delivery of projects.

members.name: BASHIR ALSABRI
members.description: is a Mechanical Engineer at Noon Consultants, experience in MEP systems, specializing in HVAC, firefighting, and plumbing. He holds a Bachelor's degree in Mechanical Engineering from Sana'a University. Throughout his career, Basheer has been involved in both technical office and site operations, including design development, shop drawings, BOQs, and project coordination. He has worked in compliance with international and local standards such as ASHRAE, NFPA, and the Saudi Building Code, contributing to efficient and high-quality project execution.

members.name: AYAH ALTHUNAYAN
members.description: A Junior Architect specializing in Revit modeling and technical drafting. She holds a Bachelor's degree in Architecture from Prince Sultan University, bringing a strong academic background and solid technical capability. Skilled in developing architectural models, preparing detailed drawings, coordinating sheets, and ensuring compliance with project standards. Known for accuracy, fast learning, and effective teamwork, contributing to reliable and high-quality design deliverables.

members.name: MOHAMMED OBAIDAT
members.description: The Head of the MEP Department, a Senior Electrical Engineer with over 30 years of extensive experience in designing, supervising, and managing electrical and MEP systems across major projects. He has led multidisciplinary engineering teams, ensuring technical excellence, compliance, and seamless coordination throughout all project stages—from conceptual design to site execution. His expertise covers power distribution, protection systems, low-current solutions, energy efficiency, and full MEP integration, making him a key figure in delivering reliable, high-quality engineering outcomes.

members.name: MOHAMMED ALASHQAR
members.description: Site supervision Architect with over 15 years of experience specializing in site supervision and construction oversight for residential and commercial projects. Skilled in managing day-to-day site activities, ensuring quality compliance, coordinating with contractors, reviewing drawings, and resolving technical issues efficiently. He holds a Bachelor's degree in Architectural Engineering and brings strong practical expertise in construction standards, supervision methodologies, and on-site risk management, ensuring precise and reliable project delivery.

members.name: ADEL RAJAB
members.description: Adel Rajab serves as the Operation Control Director at Noon Consultants, overseeing the company's operational workflows and ensuring the seamless execution of projects across all departments. With a strong background in organizational management and process optimization, he plays a pivotal role in aligning operational strategies with the firm's overall objectives. His leadership ensures efficiency, accountability, and continuous improvement within the organization.

members.name: WALEED ABDULLAH
members.description: Waleed Abdullah is a Structural Engineer at Noon Consultants, responsible for analyzing, designing, and supervising structural systems across a wide range of projects. He brings technical precision and engineering expertise to ensure that all structures meet the highest standards of safety, durability, and compliance. His contributions are integral to the successful delivery of complex construction and development projects undertaken by the firm.

members.name: OMAR HASSOUN
members.description: Omar Hassoun works as an Assistant Engineer at Noon Consultants, supporting the engineering team in the planning, coordination, and execution of various project phases. He assists senior engineers in technical assessments, site supervision, and documentation, contributing to the smooth progress of ongoing projects. His commitment to accuracy and teamwork makes him a valuable asset in delivering quality engineering outcomes.

members.name: MOHAMED JOMAA
members.description: Mohamed Jomaa is a Senior Architect (AOR) at Noon Consultants, leading architectural design efforts with a focus on innovation, functionality, and compliance with local and international building standards. As an Architect of Record, he takes full professional responsibility for the design integrity of projects, coordinating with multidisciplinary teams to deliver visionary spaces that reflect both client aspirations and regulatory requirements.

members.name: ALI ABOZAMIL
members.description: Ali Abozamil serves as the Graphic Designer at Noon Consultants, crafting compelling visual identities, presentations, and design materials that reflect the firm's professional brand. With a keen eye for detail and a strong sense of visual communication, he supports the team by producing high-quality graphics that enhance project deliverables, marketing materials, and client-facing content across all platforms.

rights: All Right Reserved To Noon Consultants 2025. ®

servicess.headerSubtitle: From a single space to an entire masterplan — we deliver at every scale.
servicess.breif: Over the years, we have proudly served a wide range of clients throughout Saudi Arabia, building a reputation for technical excellence and client-centric solutions. Our services are delivered by experts with in-depth knowledge across various engineering disciplines, each committed to delivering value-driven, high-performance outcomes. We focus on innovation, sustainability, and precision to support the long-term success of our clients’ projects.
servicess.service-1-description: The art and science of creating buildings and their physical structures. It involves the careful consideration of aesthetics, functionality, and the environment.

service-1-features.4: Value Engineering and Bill of Materials

servicess.service-2-description: The process of shaping the physical setting for life in cities and towns. It involves the arrangement, appearance, and functionality of urban spaces, including buildings, streets, parks, and other public areas.

service-2-features.5: Urban Space and Public Realm Design

servicess.service-3-description: A comprehensive, long-term planning process that provides a blueprint for the physical, economic, and social development of a particular area, such as a city, neighborhood, or large-scale development project.
servicess.service-4-description: The process of overseeing the construction phase of a project to ensure that it is completed on time, within budget, and according to the specified standards and plans.
servicess.service-5-description: The discipline concerned with the design and analysis of structures that support or resist loads. It ensures buildings and structures are safe, stable, and durable under all conditions.

service-5-features.5: Coordination with Architectural and MEP Teams

servicess.service-6-description: The process of obtaining official approvals and permits from regulatory authorities to ensure full compliance with local building codes, regulations, and standards.
servicess.service-7-description: Mechanical, Electrical, and Plumbing engineering encompasses the design and coordination of building systems to ensure functionality, efficiency, and occupant comfort.
servicess.service-8-description: The art and practice of designing and arranging outdoor spaces to enhance their aesthetic appeal, functionality, and environmental value.
servicess.service-9-description: The discipline of planning, organizing, and overseeing development projects from inception to completion, ensuring delivery on time, within budget, and to the required quality standards.
servicess.service-10-description: The art and science of enhancing interior spaces to create aesthetically pleasing and functional environments through deliberate design of layout, materials, lighting, and finishes.
servicess.service-11-description: The licensed architect responsible for the legal and professional aspects of a project, overseeing design and documentation to ensure compliance with local building codes, regulations, and standards.

slide to select the space of the service: slide to select the space of the services in m².
team_text: With years of experience collaborating with organizations across Saudi Arabia, our team has cultivated a deep, industry-specific knowledge base. Our projects are delivered by seasoned professionals with specialized expertise across key functional areas. Each team member is dedicated to providing high-quality, tailored services that align with our clients' goals contributing to the sustainable, innovative, and enduring success of every project.
